module.name: require-exhaustive-switch
module.description: Require exhaustive switch statements over finite union, enum, and boolean discriminants.

scenarios.name: should allow exhaustive string union switches
scenarios.given: a switch over a string literal union that handles every member explicitly
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the switch statement

scenarios.name: should allow default clauses as explicit fallback
scenarios.given: a switch over a finite discriminant type that includes a default clause
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the switch statement

scenarios.name: should ignore open ended string switches
scenarios.given: a switch over the general string type
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the switch statement
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because the type cannot be enumerated finitely

scenarios.name: should disallow non-exhaustive string union switches
scenarios.given: a switch over a string literal union that omits one or more members
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the switch statement
scenarios.then: a requireExhaustiveSwitch violation is reported with the missing case texts

scenarios.name: should disallow non-exhaustive enum switches
scenarios.given: a switch over an enum type that omits one or more members
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the switch statement
scenarios.then: a requireExhaustiveSwitch violation is reported with the missing enum member cases
